modules.title: Introduction to Python and Computer Programming
modules.summary: What programming is, how Python runs your code, and your very first program.

coding.prompt: Write a complete Java program (class Main) that prints exactly: Hello, Java!

modules.title: Data Types, Variables, Operators & Basic I/O
modules.summary: Variables and the core types, working with text and numbers, and talking to the user with input() and print().

coding.prompt:
Read two comma-separated numbers from a Scanner (e.g. "2,3"). Print their sum and difference exactly like:
Addition: 5
Subtraction: -1
coding.hint: Use Integer.parseInt(parts[0]) to convert the string to a number.

coding.prompt: Ask for a name with Scanner and print: Hello, NAME!
coding.hint: Use scan.nextLine() to get the string, then print it.

modules.title: Booleans, Conditional Execution, Loops & Lists
modules.summary: Make decisions with if/elif/else, repeat work with for and while loops, and store many values in lists.

coding.prompt: Read a number n from input() and print all even numbers from 2 to n (inclusive), one per line.
Read a number from input(). Print "positive", "negative" or "zero".

modules.title: Functions, Tuples, Dictionaries & Exceptions
modules.summary: Group data with tuples, sets and dictionaries, write your own reusable functions, and handle errors gracefully.

coding.prompt: Write a function add(a, b) that returns a+b. Read two comma-separated numbers from input() and print add(a, b).
Read a number from input(). Use try/except to print int(value) or "not a number" if conversion fails.

modules.title: Beyond PCEP — Files, Modules, OOP & Pythonic Python
modules.summary: Bonus module that goes past the PCEP exam toward PCAP / Python Essentials 2: files, modules, classes, and elegant Python.

coding.prompt: Make a class Dog with a name and a bark() method that prints "NAME says woof". Read the name from input(), create a Dog, call bark().
Read a number n from input(). Use a list comprehension to build squares of 1..n and print the list.

examObjectives.name: Computer Programming and Python Fundamentals
examObjectives.topics: Interpreting vs compiling; lexis, syntax & semantics; keywords, indentation & comments; literals & variables; numeral systems; numeric/string/Boolean/relational/bitwise operators; type casting; console I/O with print() and input().

examObjectives.name: Control Flow – Conditional Blocks and Loops
examObjectives.topics: if / if-else / if-elif-else and nesting; while and for loops; range() and the in operator; while-else / for-else; pass; break and continue.

examObjectives.name: Data Collections – Tuples, Dictionaries, Lists, and Strings
examObjectives.topics: Lists (indexing, slicing, methods, comprehensions, copying); tuples & immutability; dictionaries (keys/values, methods); strings (slicing, escapes, multi-line, immutability).

examObjectives.name: Functions and Exceptions
examObjectives.topics: Defining & calling functions; return, None, recursion; parameters vs arguments; name scopes & global; built-in exception hierarchy; try-except handling.
